title: Efficient scheduling of multiple software projects for work continuity and identical completion time
author: Aldhubaiban, AlMatouq

steps_raw.title: Method details
steps_raw.instruction: The first section will review the optimization model discussed in [1] which formulates the baseline SPSP that minimizes project cost and duration. We do a simple reformulation and add a new objective which will allow finding a schedule that will minimize also employee idle time while ensuring identical completion time of all projects. We then briefly discuss the random project generator discussed in [15] and the architecture of the program used which is interfaced to the online NEOS servers [14].
